articles.description: Incumbent Dheeraj Kumar is to be tranferred out and not to be appointed to any election-related post until the completion of the polls, the ECI said in its communication

articles.title: Tamil Nadu Assembly election 2026: Three villages in Coimbatore keep political displays off walls for over 35 years
Peter Magyar says his election win has ‘liberated Hungary’ from Orban
articles.description: Peter Magyar has won Hungary’s election, defeating longtime nationalist leader Viktor Orban.

articles.title: Peter Magyar’s Tisza wins Hungary election as Viktor Orban concedes
articles.description: Longtime Prime Minister Viktor Orban has conceded defeat in the country's parliamentary election.

articles.title: Military blockade of Iran's ports starts today, says US Central Command after Islamabad talks fail
articles.description: US forces would not impede freedom of navigation for vessels transiting the Strait of Hormuz to and from non-Iranian ports, and additional information would be provided to commercial mariners through a formal notice prior to the start of the blockade, it said.

articles.title: BJP will bring inclusive government in Bengal, says Adityanath
articles.description: Mr. Adityanath said there is no appeasement in Uttar Pradesh, but “inclusive Hinduism”, where every community can live peacefully in a secure environment

articles.title: Tamil Nadu election: TVK leader Sengottaiyan’s nomination accepted after being kept on hold
articles.description: When Mr. Sengottaiyan’s nomination papers were taken up, representatives of AIADMK candidate V.B. Prabhu raised objections, pointing to alleged discrepancies in the affidavit.

articles.title: These are people Israel killed in Lebanon on a single day
articles.description: In a matter of minutes, Israel killed more than 350 people across Lebanon on Wednesday, April 8.

articles.title: I do not see the Assembly election in Tamil Nadu as a close contest, says CM Stalin
articles.description: The contest is essentially between the DMK-led front and the AIADMK-led alliance. Our achievements and electoral promises have captured the imagination of the people. The outcome will disprove the notion that the DMK cannot win two consecutive elections, says the DMK president

articles.title: No close contest; the fight is between DMK and AIADMK, says CM Stalin
articles.description: Surrendering State’s rights and adjusting with the Centre is slavery; DMK government’s welfare schemes and its election manifesto have already earned widespread public appreciation, says Tamil Nadu Chief Minister Stalin

dailyNews.title: Turkish President Erdogan calls Netanyahu ‘Hitler’, blinded by ‘blood, hatred’; threatens to invade Israel
dailyNews.description: Turkish President Recep Tayyip Erdogan slammed Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu and threatened to invade Israel. The development comes as high-stakes talks between the US and Iran in Islamabad failed to reach an agreement.

dailyNews.title: Iranian authorities remain defiant, urge supporters to stay in streets

dailyNews.title: Oil Prices Surge Above $100 After Peace Talks Fail and Trump Threatens Blockade
dailyNews.description: Oil prices surged as markets reopened on Sunday following news that U.S. peace talks with Iran had ended without a deal.

dailyNews.title: Trump Fires Board That Oversees Presidio in San Francisco
dailyNews.description: All six board members that oversee the national historic landmark were terminated, part of the administration’s efforts to reshape the federal bureaucracy.

dailyNews.title: Cuba’s President Projects Defiance in Standoff With the U.S.
dailyNews.description: Miguel Díaz-Canel’s stance on “Meet the Press” reflected how Cuba is digging in against pressure from a Trump administration distracted by the war in Iran.

dailyNews.title: Pope Leo, President Trump at odds over immigration in U.S. and Iran war
dailyNews.description: Pope Leo XIV and President Trump, two of the most influential Americans in the world, are at odds over the war in Iran and the federal crackdown on immigration in the United States.

dailyNews.title: Influential U.S. cardinals caution against Iran war, Trump immigration policies
dailyNews.description: In the months since his election, Pope Leo has spoken up against both the war in Iran and the mass deportation of migrants in the U.S. His statements have inspired American cardinals to speak out.

dailyNews.title: Viktor Orbán concedes election defeat in a blow to Hungary's far right
dailyNews.description: Peter Magyar's center-right Tisza party is projected to win Hungary's parliamentary election, bringing an end to 16 years of authoritarian rule under Viktor Orbán, a far-right ally of both President Donald Trump and Russian President Vladimir Putin.

dailyNews.title: Oil prices surge after Trump says U.S. will blockade the Strait of Hormuz
dailyNews.description: The price of oil surged Sunday night after President Donald Trump said the U.S. would blockade the Strait of Hormuz after peace talks with Iran failed.U.S.

dailyNews.title: Oil prices surge above $100 as U.S. Navy to blockade Iran's ports after peace talks fail
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump said he ordered the U.S. Navy to find and interdict any ship in international waters that has paid a toll to Iran to transit the strait.

dailyNews.title: Trump says U.S. will blockade Strait of Hormuz after Iran peace talks fail
dailyNews.description: Trump said the U.S. blockade will stop Iran from policing the strait and benefiting economically while the rest of the world suffers from its closure.

dailyNews.title: Trump's 250-foot 'triumphal arch' would loom over Potomac, new renderings show
dailyNews.description: Rep. Don Beyer said "President Trump is focused on a taxpayer-funded vanity project that would choke traffic, block our skyline, and tower over sacred ground."

dailyNews.title: Trump praises Palantir as stock has worst week in over a year and Iran conflict drags on
dailyNews.description: Palantir's Maven platform have reportedly been used in the U.S. military campaign in Iran.
